description: Canon hooks — skill activation on every prompt, pre-commit secrets detection, pre-push review guard, large file guard, learn nudge, and compaction check

hooks.prompt: [Canon] If you are about to write or modify code and have NOT yet loaded Canon principles for the current task, load them via get_principles. If principles are already loaded for this task, or the user is just asking a question / requesting a review / continuing a conversation, skip principle loading and proceed directly. Do NOT activate skills or load principles redundantly — avoid unnecessary API calls.
